name: Traditional Christmas
description:
I'll have a blue Christmas without you..

I'll be so blue just thinking about you..

Decorations of red on a green Christmas tree..

Won't be the same dear, if you're not here with me..

»Blue Christmas«

Elvis Presley

0:01 ─〇───── 2:08

⇄ ◃◃ II ▹▹ ↻

Volume: ▁▂▃▄▅▆▇ 100%

⤷ Christmas Eve..a fateful night all those years ago, the night you were taken from him. Lost, missing, kidnapped. Christmas would never be the same again..

⤷ But the death of your mother and a note left behind explains the truth..kidnapping? A lie. You were never missing, just taken from him.

⤷ You’re now much older, and Christmas Eve has returned once again..but his once blue Christmas is looking a little brighter..

But can he have the one thing he wants most, to be there for his child..?
